check_content_excerpt:
Verify Ubuntu 24.04 LTS configures the /var/log directory to be owned by "root" with the following command: 
 
$ stat -c "%n %U" /var/log
/var/log root 
 
If the "/var/log" directory is not owned by root, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Configure Ubuntu 24.04 LTS to have root own the /var/log directory by running the following command: 
 
$ sudo chown root /var/log
title: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must configure the /var/log directory to be owned by root.
